endpoints.name: Get Several Albums
endpoints.description: Get Spotify catalog information for multiple albums identified by their Spotify IDs.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get Album
endpoints.description: Get Spotify catalog information for a single album.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get Album Tracks
endpoints.description:
Get Spotify catalog information about an album’s tracks.
Optional parameters can be used to limit the number of tracks returned.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get Several Artists
endpoints.description: Get Spotify catalog information for several artists based on their Spotify IDs.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get Artist
endpoints.description: Get Spotify catalog information for a single artist identified by their unique Spotify ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get Artist's Albums
endpoints.description: Get Spotify catalog information about an artist's albums.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get Artist's Related Artists
endpoints.description: Get Spotify catalog information about artists similar to a given artist. Similarity is based on analysis of the Spotify community's [listening history](http://news.spotify.com/se/2010/02/03/related-artists/).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get Artist's Top Tracks
endpoints.description: Get Spotify catalog information about an artist's top tracks by country.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get Track's Audio Analysis
endpoints.description: Get a low-level audio analysis for a track in the Spotify catalog. The audio analysis describes the track’s structure and musical content, including rhythm, pitch, and timbre.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get Tracks' Audio Features
endpoints.description: Get audio features for multiple tracks based on their Spotify IDs.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get Track's Audio Features
endpoints.description:
Get audio feature information for a single track identified by its unique
Spotify ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get Several Audiobooks
endpoints.description:
Get Spotify catalog information for several audiobooks identified by their Spotify IDs.
**Note: Audiobooks are only available for the US, UK, Ireland, New Zealand and Australia markets.**
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get an Audiobook
endpoints.description:
Get Spotify catalog information for a single audiobook.
**Note: Audiobooks are only available for the US, UK, Ireland, New Zealand and Australia markets.**
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get Audiobook Chapters
endpoints.description:
Get Spotify catalog information about an audiobook's chapters.
**Note: Audiobooks are only available for the US, UK, Ireland, New Zealand and Australia markets.**
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get Several Browse Categories
endpoints.description: Get a list of categories used to tag items in Spotify (on, for example, the Spotify player’s “Browse” tab).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get Single Browse Category
endpoints.description: Get a single category used to tag items in Spotify (on, for example, the Spotify player’s “Browse” tab).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CATEGORY_ID}} with a real category_id.

endpoints.name: Get Category's Playlists
endpoints.description: Get a list of Spotify playlists tagged with a particular category.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CATEGORY_ID}} with a real category_id.

endpoints.name: Get Featured Playlists
endpoints.description: Get a list of Spotify featured playlists (shown, for example, on a Spotify player's 'Browse' tab).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get New Releases
endpoints.description: Get a list of new album releases featured in Spotify (shown, for example, on a Spotify player’s “Browse” tab).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get Several Chapters
endpoints.description:
Get Spotify catalog information for several chapters identified by their Spotify IDs.
**Note: Chapters are only available for the US, UK, Ireland, New Zealand and Australia markets.**
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get a Chapter
endpoints.description:
Get Spotify catalog information for a single chapter.
**Note: Chapters are only available for the US, UK, Ireland, New Zealand and Australia markets.**
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get Several Episodes
endpoints.description: Get Spotify catalog information for several episodes based on their Spotify IDs.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get Episode
endpoints.description:
Get Spotify catalog information for a single episode identified by its
unique Spotify ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get Available Markets
endpoints.description: Get the list of markets where Spotify is available.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get Current User's Profile
endpoints.description:
Get detailed profile information about the current user (including the
current user's username).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get User's Saved Albums
endpoints.description: Get a list of the albums saved in the current Spotify user's 'Your Music' library.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Save Albums for Current User
endpoints.description: Save one or more albums to the current user's 'Your Music' library.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Remove Users' Saved Albums
endpoints.description: Remove one or more albums from the current user's 'Your Music' library.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Check User's Saved Albums
endpoints.description: Check if one or more albums is already saved in the current Spotify user's 'Your Music' library.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get User's Saved Audiobooks
endpoints.description: Get a list of the audiobooks saved in the current Spotify user's 'Your Music' library.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Save Audiobooks for Current User
endpoints.description: Save one or more audiobooks to the current Spotify user's library.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Remove User's Saved Audiobooks
endpoints.description: Remove one or more audiobooks from the Spotify user's library.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Check User's Saved Audiobooks
endpoints.description: Check if one or more audiobooks are already saved in the current Spotify user's library.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get User's Saved Episodes
endpoints.description: Get a list of the episodes saved in the current Spotify user's library.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Save Episodes for Current User
endpoints.description: Save one or more episodes to the current user's library.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Remove User's Saved Episodes
endpoints.description: Remove one or more episodes from the current user's library.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Check User's Saved Episodes
endpoints.description: Check if one or more episodes is already saved in the current Spotify user's 'Your Episodes' library.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get Followed Artists
endpoints.description: Get the current user's followed artists.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Follow Artists or Users
endpoints.description: Add the current user as a follower of one or more artists or other Spotify users.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Unfollow Artists or Users
endpoints.description: Remove the current user as a follower of one or more artists or other Spotify users.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Check If User Follows Artists or Users
endpoints.description: Check to see if the current user is following one or more artists or other Spotify users.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get Playback State
endpoints.description: Get information about the user’s current playback state, including track or episode, progress, and active device.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Transfer Playback
endpoints.description: Transfer playback to a new device and determine if it should start playing.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get Currently Playing Track
endpoints.description: Get the object currently being played on the user's Spotify account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get Available Devices
endpoints.description: Get information about a user’s available devices.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Skip To Next
endpoints.description: Skips to next track in the user’s queue.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Pause Playback
endpoints.description: Pause playback on the user's account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Start/Resume Playback
endpoints.description: Start a new context or resume current playback on the user's active device.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Skip To Previous
endpoints.description: Skips to previous track in the user’s queue.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get the User's Queue
endpoints.description: Get the list of objects that make up the user's queue.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Add Item to Playback Queue
endpoints.description: Add an item to the end of the user's current playback queue.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get Recently Played Tracks
endpoints.description:
Get tracks from the current user's recently played tracks.
_**Note**: Currently doesn't support podcast episodes._
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Set Repeat Mode
endpoints.description:
Set the repeat mode for the user's playback. Options are repeat-track,
repeat-context, and off.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Seek To Position
endpoints.description: Seeks to the given position in the user’s currently playing track.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Toggle Playback Shuffle
endpoints.description: Toggle shuffle on or off for user’s playback.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Set Playback Volume
endpoints.description: Set the volume for the user’s current playback device.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get Current User's Playlists
endpoints.description:
Get a list of the playlists owned or followed by the current Spotify
user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get User's Saved Shows
endpoints.description: Get a list of shows saved in the current Spotify user's library. Optional parameters can be used to limit the number of shows returned.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Save Shows for Current User
endpoints.description: Save one or more shows to current Spotify user's library.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Remove User's Saved Shows
endpoints.description: Delete one or more shows from current Spotify user's library.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Check User's Saved Shows
endpoints.description: Check if one or more shows is already saved in the current Spotify user's library.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get User's Top Artists
endpoints.description: Get the current user's top artists based on calculated affinity.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get User's Top Tracks
endpoints.description: Get the current user's top tracks based on calculated affinity.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get User's Saved Tracks
endpoints.description: Get a list of the songs saved in the current Spotify user's 'Your Music' library.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Save Tracks for Current User
endpoints.description: Save one or more tracks to the current user's 'Your Music' library.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Remove User's Saved Tracks
endpoints.description: Remove one or more tracks from the current user's 'Your Music' library.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Check User's Saved Tracks
endpoints.description: Check if one or more tracks is already saved in the current Spotify user's 'Your Music' library.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get Playlist
endpoints.description: Get a playlist owned by a Spotify user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PLAYLIST_ID}} with a real playlist_id.

endpoints.name: Change Playlist Details
endpoints.description:
Change a playlist's name and public/private state. (The user must, of
course, own the playlist.)
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PLAYLIST_ID}} with a real playlist_id.

endpoints.name: Follow Playlist
endpoints.description: Add the current user as a follower of a playlist.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PLAYLIST_ID}} with a real playlist_id.

endpoints.name: Unfollow Playlist
endpoints.description: Remove the current user as a follower of a playlist.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PLAYLIST_ID}} with a real playlist_id.

endpoints.name: Check if Users Follow Playlist
endpoints.description: Check to see if one or more Spotify users are following a specified playlist.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PLAYLIST_ID}} with a real playlist_id.

endpoints.name: Get Playlist Cover Image
endpoints.description: Get the current image associated with a specific playlist.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PLAYLIST_ID}} with a real playlist_id.

endpoints.name: Get Playlist Items
endpoints.description: Get full details of the items of a playlist owned by a Spotify user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PLAYLIST_ID}} with a real playlist_id.

endpoints.name: Add Items to Playlist
endpoints.description: Add one or more items to a user's playlist.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PLAYLIST_ID}} with a real playlist_id.

endpoints.name: Update Playlist Items
endpoints.description:
Either reorder or replace items in a playlist depending on the request's parameters. To reorder items, include `range_start`, `insert_before`, `range_length` and `snapshot_id` in the request's body. To replace items, include `uris` as either a query parameter or in the request's body. Replacing items in a playlist will overwrite its existing items. This operation can be used for replacing or clearing items in a playlist.
**Note**: Replace and reorder are mutually exclusive operations which share the same endpoint, but have different parameters. These operations can't be applied together in a single request.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PLAYLIST_ID}} with a real playlist_id.

endpoints.name: Remove Playlist Items
endpoints.description: Remove one or more items from a user's playlist.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PLAYLIST_ID}} with a real playlist_id.

endpoints.name: Get Recommendations
endpoints.description:
Recommendations are generated based on the available information for a given seed entity and matched against similar artists and tracks. If there is sufficient information about the provided seeds, a list of tracks will be returned together with pool size details.

For artists and tracks that are very new or obscure there might not be enough data to generate a list of tracks.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get Available Genre Seeds
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of available genres seed parameter values for [recommendations](/documentation/web-api/reference/#/operations/get-recommendations).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Search for Item
endpoints.description:
Get Spotify catalog information about albums, artists, playlists, tracks, shows, episodes or audiobooks that match a keyword string.
**Note: Audiobooks are only available for the US, UK, Ireland, New Zealand and Australia markets.**
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get Several Shows
endpoints.description: Get Spotify catalog information for several shows based on their Spotify IDs.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get Show
endpoints.description:
Get Spotify catalog information for a single show identified by its
unique Spotify ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get Show Episodes
endpoints.description: Get Spotify catalog information about an show’s episodes. Optional parameters can be used to limit the number of episodes returned.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get Several Tracks
endpoints.description: Get Spotify catalog information for multiple tracks based on their Spotify IDs.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get Track
endpoints.description:
Get Spotify catalog information for a single track identified by its
unique Spotify ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get User's Profile
endpoints.description: Get public profile information about a Spotify user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{USER_ID}} with a real user_id.

endpoints.name: Get User's Playlists
endpoints.description: Get a list of the playlists owned or followed by a Spotify user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{USER_ID}} with a real user_id.

endpoints.name: Create Playlist
endpoints.description:
Create a playlist for a Spotify user. (The playlist will be empty until
you [add tracks](/documentation/web-api/reference/#/operations/add-tracks-to-playlist).)
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOTIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SPOTIFY ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{USER_ID}} with a real user_id.
